faqs.q: How long does it take to develop a custom website?
faqs.a: A full custom website typically takes 4-8 weeks, depending on complexity and requirements.

faqs.q: What's the difference between custom website and template?
faqs.a: Custom website is built from scratch for your specific needs, while templates are limited to predefined designs and functionality.

faqs.q: Do you provide support after delivery?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide 3 months free technical support and maintenance after project delivery.

faqs.q: Will the website be search engine friendly?
faqs.a: Absolutely! All our websites are SEO optimized from day one with technical SEO, schema markup and fast loading times.

faqs.q: What security measures do you implement?
faqs.a: We use end-to-end encryption, OAuth authentication, secure APIs, and regular security updates for maximum data protection.
Yes, we integrate payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal), CRM systems, marketing automation tools, and any other service you need.
